items.shape_or_design: flat chain with intricate floral and circular motifs and a decorative pendant-like design
items.rationale: Medium confidence due to partial overlap and unclear exact chain count. Weight range conservative for a heavy traditional necklace with floral motifs and pendant. Purity assumed typical for traditional yellow gold jewellery, likely 22K. Value calculated using 22K gold rate 12435 INR/g plus modest making charges.

High confidence due to isolated position and clear pair of stud earrings. Weight estimated conservatively for small floral gold studs. Purity likely 22K consistent with traditional yellow gold earrings. Value calculated similarly to necklace.

items.shape_or_design: cylindrical stack of multiple bangles with decorative patterns
items.rationale: High confidence on bangles due to visible stack and decorative patterns, though fine details partially obscured. Count estimated conservatively as 3 bangles. Weight range typical for solid 22K gold bangles with decoration. Value based on 22K gold rate with added making charges.

assumptions: Gold price assumed 22K at 12435 INR per gram as reference from Goodreturns on 23 March 2026.
Making charges and other levies included conservatively in value estimates.
Purity assumed likely 22K for traditional yellow gold jewellery based on visible metal color and design style.
Weight estimates are conservative, favoring underestimation given partial overlap and unclear details.
Total value range is sum of item value ranges ensuring arithmetic consistency.
